mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER VALUES(#{id}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberPicture}, #{memberName}, #{memberNickname})
mapper.select: SELECT TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_PASSWORD, TBM.MEMBER_PICTURE, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBSM.MEMBER_ID, TBSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, TBSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER FROM TBL_MEMBER TBM JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER TBSM ON TBM.ID = TBSM.MEMBER_ID WHERE TBM.ID = #{id}

SELECT TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_PASSWORD, TBM.MEMBER_PICTURE, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBSM.MEMBER_ID, TBSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, TBSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER FROM TBL_MEMBER TBM JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER TBSM ON TBM.ID = TBSM.MEMBER_ID WHERE TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(ID) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail}
